title: Withdraw ₳12,000,000 for Cardano Builder DAO administered by Intersect

rationale.summary: Vote: NEEDS_MORE_INFO. For this TreasuryWithdrawals (enacted), critical information needed for a responsible directional vote is still missing. Decisive reason: if claims cannot be tied to replayable evidence, abstaining avoids overclaiming certainty. Weighed against it: the proposal substantiates "This treasury withdrawal funds Cardano Builder DAO which will provide the following services: The Cardano Builder DAO ( CB DAO ) is a smart contract-enforced , member-governed funding mechanism created to support the application-layer growth of the Cardano..." and clears the evidence gates. What would enable a directional vote: Provide: independent ecosystem-value evidence packet; Provide: verified ecosystem benefit or strategic necessity. Residual uncertainty: Treasury flow signal is in stressed regime (total inflow (tau + donations) vs enacted withdrawals). Confidence context: score -0.18; confidence 76.6%.
rationale.summary_raw: DRep ratification support is above the hard-fork threshold; treated as a positive context signal.
top_fixes: Provide: verified ecosystem benefit or strategic necessity
Provide: cost comparables, budget proportionality, or sustainability evidence
missing_evidence: verified ecosystem benefit or strategic necessity
cost comparables, budget proportionality, or sustainability evidence
delivery controls, milestones, assurance, or remedy path

sections.title: Intake
sections.conclusion: Baseline fields and source anchors establish whether the proposal can be reviewed at all.

sections.title: Claims and evidence
findings: Proposal document read by reasoning layer: yes
Requested: Withdraw ₳12,000,000 for Cardano Builder DAO administered by Intersect

Deliverables: This treasury withdrawal funds Cardano Builder DAO which will provide the following services: The Cardano Builder DAO ( CB DAO ) is a smart contract-enforced , member-governed funding mechanism created to support the application-layer growth of the Cardano..., Its core purpose is to provide sustainable financial backing and strategic oversight to high-impact projects that are directly responsible for existing user adoption, on-chain activity, Total Value Locked (TVL), and ecosystem engagement., While Cardano's governance structure and funding mechanisms, such as Project Catalyst and core development committees, have been instrumental in bootstrapping protocol advancements and open-source tooling, there remains a substantial gap in ongoing support..., Through a transparent governance framework , strict accountability mechanisms , and a metrics-first funding approach , CB DAO ensures that builders with growing products on mainnet can scale sustainably, integrate cutting-edge Cardano infrastructure (e.g.

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, high materiality): This treasury withdrawal funds Cardano Builder DAO which will provide the following services: The Cardano Builder DAO ( CB DAO ) is a smart contract-enforced , member-governed funding mechanism created to support the application-layer growth of the Cardano...

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, low materiality): Its core purpose is to provide sustainable financial backing and strategic oversight to high-impact projects that are directly responsible for existing user adoption, on-chain activity, Total Value Locked (TVL), and ecosystem engagement.

Claim (technical, independently_verifiable, high materiality): While Cardano's governance structure and funding mechanisms, such as Project Catalyst and core development committees, have been instrumental in bootstrapping protocol advancements and open-source tooling, there remains a substantial gap in ongoing support...

Claim (technical, independently_verifiable, high materiality): Through a transparent governance framework , strict accountability mechanisms , and a metrics-first funding approach , CB DAO ensures that builders with growing products on mainnet can scale sustainably, integrate cutting-edge Cardano infrastructure (e.g.

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, low materiality): This proposal aims to solve the following problem: This proposal seeks to address the lack of dedicated, sustainable financial support and strategic oversight for functioning dApps that drive real usage, transaction volume, and Total Value Locked (TVL) on t...

Claim (technical, independently_verifiable, high materiality): While Cardano has mechanisms for new protocol development and early-stage funding, there is currently no infrastructure specifically designed to financially support application-layer projects that are already live on mainnet and which are driving Cardano's...
sections.conclusion: Each claim must map to replayable public evidence; proposer assertions alone are not enough for confidence.

sections.title: Treasury analysis
findings: Six-month treasury flow regime: stressed (basis: total inflow (tau + donations) vs enacted withdrawals)
sections.conclusion: Treasury votes require a higher bar because they consume shared ADA and create precedent.

sections.title: Risk review
sections.conclusion: Risk is not a side note; unmitigated execution or governance risk can dominate an otherwise attractive proposal.

sections.title: Counterargument pass
findings: Strongest YES: the proposal substantiates "This treasury withdrawal funds Cardano Builder DAO which will provide the following services: The Cardano Builder DAO ( CB DAO ) is a smart contract-enforced , member-governed funding mechanism created to support the application-layer growth of the Cardano..." and clears the evidence gates.
Strongest NO: weak controls, unclear delivery, or governance precedent could outweigh the benefit of TreasuryWithdrawals.
Strongest hold: if claims cannot be tied to replayable evidence, abstaining avoids overclaiming certainty.
sections.conclusion: A defensible rationale must show the best opposing case before it reaches a vote.

sections.title: Synthesis
findings: Final vote must be derived from completed sections above, not from a prose summary.
The public rationale should name the decisive section and the strongest counterargument.
sections.conclusion: The vote is only credible if the assessment tree shows enough work for a skeptical delegator to audit.

decision_contract.composite_formula: 40% ecosystem benefit + 25% delivery confidence + 20% cost efficiency + 15% downside protection - 0.50
decision_contract.benefit_formula: 18% critical infrastructure + 8% open source + 15% adoption + 12% ecosystem leverage + 10% strategic necessity + 10% prior delivery + 10% established service + 8% builder dependency + 5% low substitutability + 4% non-funding disruption risk
decision_contract.yes_rule: All quality floors, independently verified evidence, verified NCL, and portfolio capacity must pass.
decision_contract.no_rule: Requires affirmative independently verified waste/harm plus ecosystem benefit below 55%; missing evidence alone is never NO.
decision_contract.portfolio_gate: Verified on-chain Net Change Limit and opportunity-cost portfolio eligibility are mandatory for treasury direction.
